CREATE_PRIVATE_TAGS: mutation CreatePrivateTags($input: CreatePrivateTagsInput!) { createPrivateTags(input: $input) { success errors { code message field __typename } data { tag { id customerId name __typename } success message associations { styleId success message __typename } __typename } __typename } }
UPDATE_PRIVATE_TAG: mutation UpdatePrivateTag($input: UpdatePrivateTagInput!) { updatePrivateTag(input: $input) { success errors { code message field __typename } tag { id customerId name __typename } __typename } }
DELETE_PRIVATE_TAGS: mutation DeletePrivateTags($input: DeletePrivateTagsInput!) { deletePrivateTags(input: $input) { success errors { code message field __typename } results { success errors { code message field __typename } tag { id customerId __typename } __typename } __typename } }
UPDATE_PROFILE: mutation UpdateProfile($input: UpdateProfileInput!) { updateProfile(input: $input) { id isActive __typename } }
CREATE_TEAM: mutation CreateTeam($input: CreateTeamInput!) { createTeam(input: $input) { id name __typename } }
UPDATE_TEAM: mutation UpdateTeam($input: UpdateTeamInput!) { updateTeam(input: $input) { id name __typename } }
CREATE_ROLE: mutation CreateRole($input: CreateRoleInput!) { createRole(input: $input) { errors { code field message __typename } role { id __typename } success __typename } }
UPDATE_ROLE: mutation UpdateRole($input: UpdateRoleInput!) { updateRole(input: $input) { errors { code field message __typename } role { id __typename } success __typename } }
DELETE_ROLES: mutation DeleteRole($input: DeleteRolesInput!) { deleteRoles(input: $input) { deletedIds errors { code field message __typename } success __typename } }
BULK_ACTIVATE_STYLES: mutation BulkActivateStyles($input: BulkStyleActivationInput!) { bulkActivateStyles(input: $input) { actionCounts { fontsFailed fontsProcessed fontsSkipped totalFonts __typename } actionType batchId createdAt progressPercent status updatedAt __typename } }
BULK_DEACTIVATE_STYLES: mutation BulkDeactivateStyles($input: BulkStyleDeactivationInput!) { bulkDeactivateStyles(input: $input) { actionCounts { fontsFailed fontsProcessed fontsSkipped totalFonts __typename } actionType batchId createdAt progressPercent status updatedAt __typename } }
BULK_ADD_STYLES_TO_FAVOURITES: mutation BulkAddStylesToFavourites($input: BulkStyleInput!) { bulkAddStylesToFavourites(input: $input) { actionCounts { fontsFailed fontsProcessed fontsSkipped totalFonts __typename } actionType batchId createdAt progressPercent status updatedAt __typename } }
CREATE_USER_INVITATIONS: mutation CreateUserInvitations($input: CreateInvitationsInput!) { createUserInvitations(input: $input) { data { invitationId email __typename } error { message __typename } __typename } }
UPDATE_USER_INVITATIONS: mutation UpdateUserInvitations($input: UpdateInvitationsInput!) { updateUserInvitations(input: $input) { data { invitationId status globalCustomerId __typename } error { invitationId message __typename } __typename } }
